info.name: Energy Meter API
info.description: Unified backend — Auth, Product Master Data, QC, Receiving, Assembly, PLN Code

item.name: POST Create Product (with categories + level inspection)

body.raw:
{
  "sap_code": "SAP-001",
  "name": "Meter Listrik 900VA",
  "description": "Smart meter single phase 900VA",
  "product_type_id": "{{product_type_id}}",
  "supplier_id": "{{supplier_id}}",
  "is_serialize": true,
  "is_qc": true,
  "is_active": true,
  "qc_product": "QC-METER-001",
  "category_ids": ["{{product_category_id}}"],
  "level_inspections": [
    {
      "level": "II",
      "aql_critical": 0.0,
      "aql_major": 1.0,
      "aql_minor": 2.5,
      "sample_size": 20,
      "accept_critical": 0,
      "accept_major": 1,
      "accept_minor": 3,
      "reject_critical": 1,
      "reject_major": 2,
      "reject_minor": 4,
      "qc_template_id": "{{qc_template_id}}",
      "is_active": true,
      "notes": "Standard inspection level II"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "code": "SUP-001",
  "name": "PT Supplier Indonesia",
  "contact_name": "Budi Santoso",
  "contact_email": "budi@supplier.com",
  "contact_phone": "021-12345678",
  "address": "Jl. Industri No. 1, Jakarta",
  "is_active": true
}
